styles.name: 爱心气泡
styles.svg:
<svg t="1770806354879" class="icon" viewBox="0 0 1025 1024" version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="200" height="200">
    <defs>
        <linearGradient id="heartGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
            <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#FF85A2;stop-opacity:1" />
            <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#F53D68;stop-opacity:1" />
        </linearGradient>
        
        <style>
            @keyframes twinkle {
                0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
                50% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.7); }
            }
            .star-big { animation: twinkle 1.5s infinite ease-in-out; transform-origin: center; }
            .star-small { animation: twinkle 2s infinite ease-in-out 0.5s; transform-origin: center; }
        </style>
    </defs>

    <path d="M512,187 C362,37 137,187 137,337 C137,487 362,637 512,787 C662,637 887,487 887,337 C887,187 662,37 512,187 Z" transform="translate(15,-15)" fill="#FFD1DC" opacity="0.6"></path>

    <path d="M512,187 C362,37 137,187 137,337 C137,487 362,637 512,787 C662,637 887,487 887,337 C887,187 662,37 512,187 Z" fill="url(#heartGradient)" stroke="#8B1D3D" stroke-width="15"></path>

    <g class="star-big" transform="translate(750, 200)">
        <path d="M0,-80 L15,-15 L80,0 L15,15 L0,80 L-15,15 L-80,0 L-15,-15 Z" fill="#FFFFFF"></path>
    </g>

    <g class="star-small" transform="translate(200, 450) scale(0.6)">
        <path d="M0,-80 L15,-15 L80,0 L15,15 L0,80 L-15,15 L-80,0 L-15,-15 Z" fill="#FFFFFF"></path>
    </g>

    <text x="512" y="500" font-family="Segoe UI, Arial, sans-serif" font-size="280" font-weight="bold" fill="{t}" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle" style="text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">{n}</text>
</svg>

styles.name: 六芒星
styles.svg:
<svg id="dynamicStar" viewBox="0 0 1024 1024" width="200" height="200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <!-- 蓝色霓虹渐变：左上到右下（用于向下三角形） -->
    <linearGradient id="neonGradientBlue" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00f2ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00bcff" />
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- 蓝色霓虹渐变反向：右下到左上（用于向上三角形） -->
    <linearGradient id="neonGradientBlueReverse" x1="100%" y1="50%" x2="0%" y2="0%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00f2ff" />
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#00bcff" />
    </linearGradient>

    <!-- 蓝色光晕滤镜（用于第一个三角形） -->
    <filter id="neonGlowBlue" x="-30%" y="-30%" width="160%" height="160%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blurInner"/>
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="15" result="blurOuter"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blurOuter"/>
        <feMergeNode in="blurInner"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <!-- 通用光晕滤镜（用于第二个三角形及耀点） -->
    <filter id="neonGlowSoft" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="2" result="blurInner"/>
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="8" result="blurOuter"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="blurOuter"/>
        <feMergeNode in="blurInner"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>

    <!-- 交织遮罩（保持不变） -->
    <mask id="interweaveMask">
      <rect width="1024" height="1024" fill="white" />
      <path d="M 617.467 294.68 L 637.467 329.32" stroke="black" stroke-width="32" stroke-linecap="round" />
      <path d="M 291.067 494.68 L 271.067 529.32" stroke="black" stroke-width="32" stroke-linecap="round" />
      <path d="M 607.467 712 L 647.467 712" stroke="black" stroke-width="32" stroke-linecap="round" />
    </mask>
  </defs>

  <!-- 背景耀点（保持原有淡蓝色） -->
  <g fill="#00f2ff" opacity="0.5" filter="url(#neonGlowBlue)">
    <circle cx="300" cy="400" r="10" />
    <circle cx="700" cy="350" r="8" />
    <circle cx="450" cy="750" r="9" />
    <circle cx="800" cy="600" r="6" />
    <circle cx="250" cy="650" r="9" />
    <circle cx="512" cy="200" r="8" />
  </g>
  <g fill="white" opacity="0.6">
    <circle cx="350" cy="420" r="5" />
    <circle cx="650" cy="370" r="4" />
    <circle cx="480" cy="730" r="5" />
    <circle cx="780" cy="580" r="3" />
  </g>

  <!-- 黑色文字 -->
  <text x="512" y="600" 
        font-family="Arial, sans-serif" 
        font-size="260" 
        font-weight="bold" 
        fill="{t}" 
        text-anchor="middle" 
        dominant-baseline="middle"
        style="text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);">
    {n}
  </text>

  <!-- 六芒星主体 -->
  <g stroke-width="30" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
    <!-- 蓝色三角形（向下）：渐变左上→右下 -->
    <path id="starA" d="M 512 112 L 858.4 712 L 165.6 712 Z" fill="none" 
          filter="url(#neonGlowBlue)" 
          stroke="url(#neonGradientBlue)" />

    <!-- 蓝色三角形（向上）：渐变右下→左上，应用遮罩 -->
    <path id="starB" d="M 512 912 L 165.6 312 L 858.4 312 Z" fill="none" 
          filter="url(#neonGlowSoft)" 
          stroke="url(#neonGradientBlueReverse)" 
          mask="url(#interweaveMask)" />
  </g>

  <!-- 沿第二个三角形（向上）的随机耀点（仍用蓝色，增强统一感） -->
  <g fill="#00f2ff" opacity="0.9" filter="url(#neonGlowSoft)">
    <!-- 沿上边 -->
    <circle cx="210" cy="330" r="6" />
    <circle cx="300" cy="320" r="5" />
    <circle cx="400" cy="315" r="7" />
    <circle cx="512" cy="312" r="8" />
    <circle cx="624" cy="315" r="6" />
    <circle cx="724" cy="320" r="5" />
    <circle cx="814" cy="330" r="7" />
    <!-- 沿左边 -->
    <circle cx="260" cy="420" r="6" />
    <circle cx="230" cy="520" r="5" />
    <circle cx="215" cy="620" r="7" />
    <circle cx="210" cy="720" r="6" />
    <circle cx="220" cy="820" r="8" />
    <!-- 沿右边 -->
    <circle cx="764" cy="420" r="5" />
    <circle cx="794" cy="520" r="7" />
    <circle cx="809" cy="620" r="6" />
    <circle cx="814" cy="720" r="5" />
    <circle cx="804" cy="820" r="8" />
    <!-- 内部随机 -->
    <circle cx="512" cy="600" r="9" opacity="0.7" />
    <circle cx="400" cy="550" r="5" opacity="0.8" />
    <circle cx="620" cy="550" r="6" opacity="0.8" />
    <circle cx="550" cy="450" r="7" opacity="0.7" />
  </g>
</svg>
